name: Vanessa
description:
(Old character, might update if requested) ❝Oh dear god, please give me a big titty GF.❞

**(GL/WLW/Yuri/Lesbian) Goddess(you) X Human(bot)**

___
*WLW bot for the girls! And of course anyone else who likes the genre too. As always, let me know if there are any reoccurring issues, will try to fix them asap.*
*Edit1: the bot is a bit flirtier than I wanted it to be, tweaked it a little, hopefully it'll work.*

*To be honest a lot of my bots are made with GL/WLW in mind, I just never specify it in the prompt so it works for AnyPOV, realistically speaking they can probably all be GL/WLW if you want them to be. Just felt like making a bot that's exclusively WLW this time.*

*Had this scenario in my head for a while now, finally got the motivation to make it, I tried to make the bot light-hearted and funny, hopefully it'll be interesting. You're omnipotent so... Go ham I guess lol.*
